name: WHITE MOUNTAINS INSURANCE GROUP LTD
summary: White Mountains Insurance Group, Ltd. is a Bermuda-based holding company engaged in opportunistic acquisitions in insurance, financial services, and related sectors. It operates through five segments: Ark/WM Outrigger (specialty property and casualty insurance and reinsurance), HG Global (municipal bond guarantee reinsurance), Kudu (capital solutions for asset and wealth management firms), Distinguished (specialty insurance distribution), and Other Operations including interests in Bamboo, MediaAlpha, PassportCard/DavidShield, BroadStreet, and Elementum.

products.name: Ark Specialty Insurance and Reinsurance
products.description: Niche insurance and reinsurance products including property, specialty, marine & energy, casualty, and accident & health through Lloyd's syndicates and Bermuda operations.

products.name: WM Outrigger Re
products.description: Collateralized reinsurance protection on Ark's Bermuda global property catastrophe excess of loss portfolio via segregated account structure.

products.name: HG Global Municipal Bond Guarantee Reinsurance
products.description: Municipal bond guarantee reinsurance conducted through HG Global Ltd. and its reinsurance subsidiary HG Re Ltd.

products.name: Kudu Capital Solutions
products.description: Capital solutions and minority stake investments for asset and wealth management firms through Kudu Investment Management, LLC.

products.name: Distinguished Programs
products.description: Specialty insurance distribution business operated through WM Phoenix Parent, L.P. and subsidiaries d/b/a Distinguished Programs.

partnerships.description: Third-party investors provided capital alongside White Mountains in Outrigger Re Ltd. for the 2023, 2024, and 2025 underwriting years.
Ark participates in Lloyd's market through ACML, providing underwriting capacity to Syndicates 4020 and 3902 and ACSN 3832.
